name: diagGetCommParameter (FlexRay)
title: diagGetCommParameter (FlexRay)
description: Returns the value of a numeric/textual communication parameter of the given or currently active diagnostic description. The values are read from the diagnostic description if they cannot be set in the configuration dialog.

parameters.name: FlexRay.Protocol
parameters.description: The protocol variant to use. 0 AUTOSAR 2.xrest reserved for future extensions

parameters.name: FlexRay.LocalAddress
parameters.description: Address of *this* node, i.e. ECU address in ECU simulation, tester address in tester nodes.

parameters.name: FlexRay.RemoteAddress
parameters.description: Address of the target node, i.e. ECU address in tester nodes, tester address in ECU simulation.

parameters.name: Note Please refer to the AUTOSAR FlexRay TP specification for details on the parameter value semantics.
Note Please refer to the AUTOSAR FlexRay TP specification for details on the parameter value semantics.
Note Please refer to the AUTOSAR FlexRay TP specification for details on the parameter value semantics.
Note Please refer to the AUTOSAR FlexRay TP specification for details on the parameter value semantics.
FlexRay.LocalStartSlot
parameters.description: Id of first slot the node sends in

parameters.name: FlexRay.LocalCount
parameters.description: Number of consecutive slots to send in

parameters.name: FlexRay.LocalStartCycle
parameters.description: First cycle to send slots in

parameters.name: FlexRay.LocalCycleRepetition
parameters.description: Cycle spacing to send slots in

parameters.name: FlexRay.LocalPayloadLen
parameters.description: Length of slots to send in

parameters.name: FlexRay.RemoteStartSlot
parameters.description: Id of first slot to receive

parameters.name: FlexRay.RemoteCount
parameters.description: Number of consecutive slots to receive

parameters.name: FlexRay.RemoteStartCycle
parameters.description: First cycle to receive slots in

parameters.name: FlexRay.RemoteCycleRepetition
parameters.description: Cycle spacing of slots to receive

description: You can find examples for this function in the CAPL callback interface (CCI) reference implementations.See Diagnostics: Connection of the Communication Layer for details.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
